lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to verify the mining loadout, ore-rack capacity and power budget for this ship.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout (hardpoint sizes, optional-internal sizes) and module variants behind the mining-fit tables.

sources.label: Inara — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Stock hull stats, internal layout and module sellers used to size the refinery, limpet controllers and cargo racks.

sources.label: Fandom — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Manufacturer (Faulcon DeLacy), multirole assessment and release history informing the role overview.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Cobra Mk V ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: In-depth review of the Cobra Mk V covering cargo capacity, jump range and its trading/mining potential.
